name: Cool-Gray Marker Wireframes
generation_environment: Image-capable host that can include the applicable package images as references; exact model settings may vary.

rules.statement: Use the paper character established by documented real-marker evidence; material fidelity takes priority over numeric color matching.

permitted_values.capture: real close-up photograph, scan, or unaltered demonstration frame
permitted_values.consistency: fixed paper, scale, lighting, marker family, and crop within the primary specimen family

rules.statement: Use cool-gray alcohol-marker and graphite relationships established by the approved real-material evidence set; evaluate stroke behavior before color accuracy.

permitted_values.graphite: real graphite over and beside marker

rules.statement: Marker areas must visibly preserve chisel-nib direction and width, longitudinal streaking, translucent single-pass coverage, darker overlap buildup, localized pooling, subtle capillary feathering, and distinct one-pass, two-pass, and blended-pass behavior.

permitted_values.evidence: real close-up photographs, scans, or unaltered demonstration frames with explicit source roles
permitted_values.bleeding: both acceptable and excessive examples required

rules.statement: Use graphite character established by documented real-material examples showing dry pencil or graphite with marker and the contamination risk of marker over graphite.

permitted_values.evidence: real graphite or pencil interaction with marker
permitted_values.weights: to be approved from the evidence set

rules.statement: Keep UI geometry recognizable and refined while allowing small line and edge irregularities; never cartoon-distort controls.

permitted_values.imperfection: visible on close inspection, not distracting

rules.statement: Keep desktop major content at least 7.5% from canvas edges and preserve visible empty paper between groups.
Keep mobile primary content at least 8% from side edges and clearly separated from the outer device or sheet outline.

permitted_values.outline_exception: outer outline may sit at 5.5% or more

rules.statement: Use low-to-moderate density; under pressure, preserve readable labels, group gaps, and the protected perimeter instead of shrinking or crowding.
Use one to three short handwritten graphite notes only when they clarify interaction or hierarchy; use curved connectors and open arrowheads.
Use restrained typeset-like labels for screen content and handwriting only for annotations; maintain legibility over decorative authenticity.
Use physical marker overlap and pooling only; prohibit digitally simulated depth such as glossy shadows, glass effects, volumetric lighting, airbrush shading, and blurred fills.
During restyling, preserve the supplied wireframe's core information architecture, content hierarchy, and device class.
Generate one screen per image unless the user explicitly requests a board or comparison set.
The result must read as a refined physical alcohol-marker and graphite study, never as a grayscale digital wireframe with generic texture.

surface_profiles.density: one focal card plus short grouped list and one action by default

prohibited_traits: perfect vector polish with no analog character
texture overlays or generic paper texture used as material evidence
random noise used as material evidence
blurred digital fills or airbrush shading
SVG displacement used to fake stroke edges
multiple screens in one image without explicit instruction

open_decisions.statement: Approve a materials-only sheet whose primary stroke family comes from controlled real-marker documentation before any screen generation resumes.
required_specimens: a filled rectangle made from visible directional passes
a curved stroke showing edge pooling
capture_controls: same crop within the primary family

open_decisions.statement: Approve acceptable versus excessive bleeding and one-pass versus two-pass versus blended-pass boundaries from documented real-marker studies with explicit source roles.
